summary: Code review verification of tab styling changes across 9 pages. All source code has correct styling applied (grid w-full bg-slate-100 with data-[state=active]:bg-[#082c59]). Browser automation tests encountered Cloudflare security verification blocking automated access, preventing visual verification.
